## Summary

Describe the problem being solved and the approach taken.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Scope Check

- [ ] Docs were updated for any user-visible or API-visible change.
- [ ] Claim boundaries remain accurate.
- [ ] No secrets, private health information, or sensitive payloads were added to the repository.

## Notes For Reviewers

Call out anything that needs special attention: migration impact, interoperability edge cases, or security considerations.
